summary: Re-linked the ground/stage (`gr`) library by changing build classification and object selection across many `gr` files, adding large asm fallbacks for `ground`, `grlib`, and `grticeclimber`, and marking many previously Unknown ground/stage files as Matching or NonMatching in `configure.py`. The PR also moved `InternalStageId` into `gr/forward.h`, added forward declarations for newly exposed stage data structs, expanded `gr/types.h` with archive/stage/BGM-related structs, and made broad header hygiene changes replacing direct `<stdbool.h>` includes with `<platform.h>`. There were no PR body notes or review comments in the slice, so intent beyond the title and diff is inferred from the build/link changes.
what_changed: `configure.py` changed many `melee/gr` object statuses from `Unknown` to either `Matching` or `NonMatching`; examples include `grdatfiles.c`, `grdynamicattr.c`, `grizumi.c`, `grstory.c`, `grshrine.c`, `grfigure1.c`, `grfigure2.c`, `grfigure3.c`, many Target Test stage files, and `grbattle.c` becoming `Matching`, while `ground.c`, `grlib.c`, `grfigureget.c`, and `grticeclimber.c` became `NonMatching`.

`obj_files.mk` stopped linking `src/melee/gr/ground.c.o`, `src/melee/gr/grlib.c.o`, and `src/melee/gr/grfigureget.c.o` directly, instead relying on asm objects such as `asm/melee/gr/ground.s.o`, `asm/melee/gr/grlib.s.o`, and `asm/melee/gr/grfigureget.s.o`.

Large asm files were added or regenerated for `gr`: `asm/melee/gr/ground.s` grew to an 8037-line asm body, `asm/melee/gr/grlib.s` was added, `asm/melee/gr/grticeclimber.s` was added, and `asm/melee/gr/grfigureget.s` was heavily replaced/regenerated with `.file "grfigureget.c"` and updated local symbols.
`src/melee/gr/ground.c` and `src/melee/gr/grlib.c` had large source deletions, consistent with moving link coverage for those units back to asm while keeping C stubs/nonmatching work in-tree.

`src/melee/gr/forward.h` gained forward declarations for `UnkArchiveStruct`, `UnkBgmStruct`, `UnkStage6B0`, `UnkStageDat`, and `UnkStageDatInternal`, and received the `InternalStageId` enum that had previously lived in `types.h`.

`src/melee/gr/types.h` removed `InternalStageId`, changed `StageInfo.param` from `struct _UnkStage6B0*` to `UnkStage6B0*`, and added definitions for stage/archive/audio-related structs including `UnkBgmStruct`, `UnkStage6B0`, `UnkStageDatInternal`, `UnkStageDat`, `UnkArchiveStruct`, and `grDynamicAttr_UnkStruct`.

Many headers in fighter, item, DVD, and ground code replaced explicit `<stdbool.h>` includes with `<platform.h>`, likely to centralize fixed-width/bool/platform typedef behavior needed by shared headers.
smart_moves: Used asm fallbacks for large nonmatching or unstable `gr` translation units while still recording their decompilation status as `NonMatching` in `configure.py`, preserving linkability without pretending the C matched.

Separated widely needed declarations into `gr/forward.h`, especially `InternalStageId`, so headers can refer to stage IDs without pulling all of `gr/types.h` and triggering heavier include dependencies.
Promoted many small or already-stable stage modules from `Unknown` to `Matching`, reducing ambiguity in the build manifest and making future progress tracking more accurate.

Centralized bool/platform definitions by including `<platform.h>` instead of sprinkling `<stdbool.h>` through many project headers, which is useful in a decomp codebase with custom typedef and compiler-compatibility needs.
Kept stage-data structs with conservative `Unk*` names and offset-like field names (`x0`, `x4`, `xB0`, etc.), avoiding overnaming when the semantic evidence was not yet complete.
decomp_lessons: For relink PRs, update both the high-level object status in `configure.py` and the concrete object list in `obj_files.mk`; mismatches between status and linked object source/asm can silently undermine reproducibility.
When a C file is useful for ongoing decomp but not safe to link, keep it as `NonMatching` and link the matching asm object instead of deleting the work or marking it `Unknown`.
Move enums or forward declarations to `forward.h` only when they are needed broadly and do not require full struct definitions; this reduces include cycles in large subsystems like `gr`/stage.
Use explicit placeholder struct names such as `UnkStageDat`, `UnkArchiveStruct`, and `UnkBgmStruct` when layout evidence exists but semantics remain weak; do not force premature domain names.
Header cleanups that replace standard-library includes with project platform headers can be necessary decomp infrastructure, especially when broad API headers expose `bool` or platform typedefs.
naming_conventions: Ground/stage functions and files retain the `gr*` subsystem prefix, e.g. `grFigureGet`, `grlib`, `grticeclimber`, `grdatfiles`, and Target Test files such as `grtmario`, `grtness`, and `grtpichu`.
Forward-declared or incompletely understood stage structs use `Unk*` names: `UnkArchiveStruct`, `UnkBgmStruct`, `UnkStage6B0`, `UnkStageDat`, and `UnkStageDatInternal`.
Unknown struct fields use offset-like names such as `x0`, `x4`, `xB0`, `unk0`, `unk4`, and padding arrays like `x6_pad`, preserving layout without overclaiming semantics.

`InternalStageId` enum still contains mixed legacy names such as `CASTLE`, `RCRUISE`, `KONGO`, `InternalStageID_Unk23`, and `STAGEKIND_UNK31`; the diff retains the TODO to finish values and use PascalCase.
Build manifest statuses use the project's `Object(Matching, ...)`, `Object(NonMatching, ...)`, and `Object(Unknown, ...)` convention.
assembly_or_matching_tactics: Added or regenerated asm fallback files for nonmatching `gr` units, notably `ground.s`, `grlib.s`, `grfigureget.s`, and `grticeclimber.s`.
Removed source object entries for `ground.c`, `grlib.c`, and `grfigureget.c` from `obj_files.mk` so the link uses asm objects for those translation units.
Classified `ground.c`, `grlib.c`, `grfigureget.c`, and `grticeclimber.c` as `NonMatching` in `configure.py`, documenting ongoing C work while avoiding a false matching claim.
Marked numerous previously Unknown ground/stage C files as `Matching`, including several ordinary stages, figure stages, and Break the Targets stages, improving progress accounting.

The asm diff for `grfigureget.s` includes `.file "grfigureget.c"`, local labels, `.obj` constants, and explicit global function labels such as `grFigureGet_802196F0`, showing generated/curated asm intended to match the original object layout.
follow_up_queries: Find later PRs that convert `ground.c`, `grlib.c`, `grfigureget.c`, or `grticeclimber.c` from NonMatching to Matching.
Search for later renames or refinements of `UnkStage6B0`, `UnkStageDat`, `UnkArchiveStruct`, and `UnkBgmStruct`.
Check whether `InternalStageId` was later renamed to PascalCase as the TODO suggests.
Look for subsequent PRs that remove the asm fallback entries for `asm/melee/gr/ground.s.o`, `asm/melee/gr/grlib.s.o`, or `asm/melee/gr/grfigureget.s.o`.
Search for additional broad `<platform.h>` header hygiene PRs to understand project-wide include policy.
